title: The Final Recursion of Dr. Yuki
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A physicist trapped in a time loop discovers each reset pushes her into a branched timeline where fundamental constants shift by imperceptible degrees, and after a thousand loops she is running out of stable reality.
long_description: A physicist trapped in a time loop discovers each reset pushes her into a branched timeline where fundamental constants shift by imperceptible degrees, and after a thousand loops she is running out of stable reality.
